'''bacholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:laab|laab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laab|laab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bacholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæcheleth|bæcheleth]] || [[word:bæchelej|bæchelej]] || [[word:bæchelesh|bæchelesh]] || [[word:bæchele|bæchele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachocholoth|bachocholoth]] || [[word:bachocholoj|bachocholoj]] || [[word:bachocholosh|bachocholosh]] || [[word:bachocholo|bachocholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bacholoth|bacholoth]] || [[word:bacholoj|bacholoj]] || [[word:bacholosh|bacholosh]] || [[word:bacholo|bacholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachofloth|bachofloth]] || [[word:bachofloj|bachofloj]] || [[word:bachoflosh|bachoflosh]] || [[word:bachoflof|bachoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bacholotho|bacholotho]] || [[word:bacholojo|bacholojo]] || [[word:bacholosho|bacholosho]] || [[word:bacholoko|bacholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bacholoth|bacholoth]] || [[word:bacholoj|bacholoj]] || [[word:bacholosh|bacholosh]] || [[word:bacholo|bacholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bacholothol|bacholothol]] || [[word:bacholojol|bacholojol]] || [[word:bacholoshol|bacholoshol]] || [[word:bacholokol|bacholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bacholothotho|bacholothotho]] || [[word:bacholojojo|bacholojojo]] || [[word:bacholoshosho|bacholoshosho]] || [[word:bacholoko|bacholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bacholothon|bacholothon]] || [[word:bacholojon|bacholojon]] || [[word:bacholoshon|bacholoshon]] || [[word:bacholokon|bacholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bacholothoro|bacholothoro]] || [[word:bacholojoro|bacholojoro]] || [[word:bacholoshoro|bacholoshoro]] || [[word:bacholokoro|bacholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
